title: MCP-A explain Request
description: Request for the explain primitive (SPEC §6): inspect how an answer was routed and why, and optionally provide feedback. The subject is identified by EITHER an `answer_id` (from a prior query/follow_up) OR an `action_id` (from a prior action, MAEP-0003 §3.5) — exactly one MUST be present. Both shapes require `user_id`; users may only explain their own subjects.

feedback.description: Optional feedback to improve future routing.

expected_sources.description: Sources the user thought should have been queried.

oneOf.title: explain answer Request
oneOf.description: Inspect how an answer was routed. Identified by `answer_id`.

answer_id.description: answer_id from a prior query response. Matched against user_id; users may only explain their own answers.

oneOf.title: explain action Request
oneOf.description: Inspect how a state-changing action was interpreted and routed. Identified by `action_id` (MAEP-0003 §3.5).

action_id.description: action_id from a prior action response. Matched against user_id; users may only explain their own actions.
